title: Chapter 1: The Detective's Desk
content: The rain in London never truly stops; it just changes form. Outside the window of your cramped office, neon lights from a nearby pub bleed through the smog, casting long, distorted shadows across your desk. It’s past midnight when a heavy yellow envelope is slid under your door. No knock. No footsteps trailing away. Just the official seal of the Metropolitan Police cutting through the dim light.||Inside are the case files for Thomas Vane — an investigative journalist found dead in his apartment. The official verdict? Suicide.||In this game, you are the investigator. No one will tell you what is true and what is a lie. As you read the documents, weigh things carefully: which details contradict each other? What seems staged? Your success depends on your ability to sift the important information from the noise.||The contents of the envelope are spread before you, alongside your work laptop. You need to examine all available sources to piece the picture together.

choices.text: Personal effects recovered from the scene.
Search the internet for Thomas Vane's recent publications.
